column1: # - one verse per line:  REFERENCE<TAB>verse text
# - REFERENCE is a single verse: 'Gen 1:1', '1Pet 3:18', 'Ps 23:1' (中文 ok too: 彼前3:18)
# - lines starting with # are comments; '# version: NAME' sets the corpus version
# - a literal TAB separates the reference from the text (NOT spaces)
# - verses may be in any order; partial books are fine
# Then in the TUI:  :versions import-sample,cuvs   (or pick it on the settings page)
# The imported text stays local (data/corpus/import-sample/, gitignored) and is never shared.

column2: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep.
The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
For Christ also suffered once for sins, the righteous for the unrighteous, that he might bring us to God.
因基督也曾一次为罪受苦，就是义的代替不义的，为要引我们到 神面前。
